title: Lines should not be too long
description: Lines should not be too longAnalyze your codeconsistency-formattedmaintainabilityCode SmellconventionWhy is this an issue?Scrolling horizontally to see a full line of code lowers the code readability.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

noncompliant: void processComplexDataStructureWithMultipleParametersAndVeryLongFunctionNameThatExceedsReasonableLineLengthLimitsAndMakesCodeHardToRead(int parameter1, int parameter2, std::string veryLongParameterName, bool anotherParameter) {

std::cout << "This is an extremely long output statement that contains multiple concatenated strings and variables that make the line too long: " << variable1 << ", " << variable2 << ", " << variable3 << std::endl;
compliant:
std::cout << "This is a properly formatted output: "
          << variable1 << ", "
          << variable2 << ", "
          << variable3 << std::endl;

checks.message: Line exceeds maximum length of 120 characters
